security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: A civilization strategy roguelite about science, theology and survival under three suns.
bundle.longDescription: Cradles Of Civilization is an original strategy game by Noah Walker. Guide generations of civilization through disasters, knowledge conflicts and final endings.
